rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty escalation across five distinct circuit tiers, with racing intensity increasing from Motocross Circuit baseline through Forbidden Circuit endgame

difficulty_curve.early_game: 50cc Kiddies class on Motocross Circuit - foundational racing mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through Radical Circuit and Nightmare Circuit with increased track complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: 250cc Pro class on Doom Circuit and Forbidden Circuit - maximum difficulty racing
notable_spikes: Transition from Motocross Circuit to Radical Circuit
Nightmare Circuit introduction of advanced terrain
Doom Circuit and Forbidden Circuit pro-tier challenges

notable_level_patterns.description: Five distinct circuit tiers (Motocross, Radical, Nightmare, Doom, Forbidden) create a linear difficulty ladder with corresponding engine classes (50cc Kiddies through 250cc Pro)
Engine classes (50cc, 250cc) paired with circuits allow players to tackle same track at different difficulty levels or progress through increasingly difficult tracks
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All circuits available in Co-Op variants
